nodes.context: Turkish Cypriot criminal organisation in south-east London involved in armed robbery, drug trafficking, and racketeering since the late 1960s.
Notorious London gangsters whose downfall left a power vacuum in the London underworld.
Criminal organisation that competed for control of the London underworld after the Krays.
Criminal family involved in the London underworld, engaged in a gangland war with the Arifs in the 1990s.
London-based criminal family allied with the Arifs.
Turkish organized crime groups allied with the Arifs.
Turkish Cypriot criminal family based in London, rivals of the Arifs.

edges.context: The Arifs rose to power after the downfall of the Kray brothers.
The Arifs competed with the Clerkenwell crime syndicate for control of the London underworld.
The Arifs were engaged in a highly publicised gangland war with the Brindle family during the 1990s.
The Arifs are allied with the Adams family.
The Arifs are allied with the Turkish mafia.
The Arifs have a rivalry with the Baybaşin family.
